item.title: The second you can’t avoid politics you revert to the politics that protect you and that is why we say that everything is politi...
item.description:
The second you can’t avoid politics you revert to the politics that protect you and that is why we say that everything is political because even if you are not talking about it right now the privilege of not being able to self political
